problems.question: Which has exactly one endpoint?
problems.solution_steps: A ray has one endpoint and goes on forever in one direction.
problems.hint: Think about how each starts and ends.

problems.question: An angle that measures 90 degrees is called a ___ angle.
Parallel lines are lines that ___.
choices: A) cross at a right angle
problems.solution_steps: Parallel lines stay the same distance apart and never meet.

problems.question: A triangle with all three sides equal is ___.
Perpendicular lines meet at a right angle.
problems.solution_steps: By definition, perpendicular lines form 90-degree angles.

problems.question: Which angle is obtuse?
problems.solution_steps: Obtuse: greater than 90 and less than 180.

problems.question: A triangle with a 90-degree angle is called a ___ triangle.
Which quadrilateral has exactly one pair of parallel sides?
problems.solution_steps: A trapezoid has exactly one pair of parallel sides.

problems.question: Which statement is always true of a square?
choices: A) All sides equal; all angles 90 degrees
problems.solution_steps: A square has 4 equal sides and 4 right angles.

problems.question: How many lines of symmetry does a square have?
problems.solution_steps: Square: 2 diagonals + 2 through midpoints of opposite sides = 4.

problems.question: A scalene triangle has exactly two equal sides.
problems.solution_steps: Scalene = no sides equal. Isosceles has two equal sides.

problems.question: Which figure is NOT always a parallelogram?
problems.solution_steps: A trapezoid has only one pair of parallel sides, so it is not always a parallelogram.
problems.hint: Parallelograms have two pairs of parallel sides.

problems.question: How many lines of symmetry does an equilateral triangle have?
problems.solution_steps: Equilateral triangle has 3 lines of symmetry (one from each vertex to midpoint of opposite side).

problems.question: A figure has 4 sides, all equal, and no right angles. It is most likely a ___.
problems.solution_steps: A rhombus has 4 equal sides and may or may not have right angles. If it has no right angles, it is a rhombus (not a square).
problems.hint: Square has right angles; rhombus need not.
